[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 000000101 2
1 010100100 3
2 111110010 6
3 000110000 2
4 110010000 3
5 001110001 4
6 010011000 3
7 101000001 3

01 10 110110000 4
12 21 111110001 6
23 32 011111001 6
34 43 111011001 6
45 54 111000101 5
56 65 110100101 5
67 76 111110110 7
70 07 111110010 6 match 2

02 20 001110001 4 match 5
13 31 110011000 4
24 42 101110001 5
35 53 110011101 6
46 64 111100101 6
57 75 111110111 8
60 06 010110100 4
71 17 111110010 6 match 2

72 27 111110011 7
